task_completion.description: Verify the agent opened the correct patient record for editing.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The screen shows the patient profile or edit form for James Chen with Patient ID P00002.

task_completion.description: Verify the address is updated to the new value.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The address input field or the saved profile text displays exactly '1200 Harbor Boulevard'.

task_completion.description: Verify the phone number is updated to the new value.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The phone number input field or the saved profile text displays exactly '555-0199'.

task_completion.description: Verify the email address is updated to the new value.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The email input field or the saved profile text displays exactly 'j.chen.new@email.com'.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent saved the updated patient record.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A success message, confirmation toast, or a transition from the edit form back to the updated read-only profile view is visible.

task_completion.description: Verify that the name, date of birth, and medical details were not modified.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The profile still shows the name as 'James Chen', DOB as '1978-11-22' (or equivalent date format), Sex as 'Male', and Blood Type as 'A+'.

integrity.description: The agent used the application's graphical user interface to make the edits.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the web application's UI (forms, buttons, text fields) rather than terminal commands (like curl or direct database queries).

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual medical records application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The application window is visible and functional, not a text editor, mock HTML file, or a screenshot of the task description.

integrity.description: The agent did not use database admin interfaces to bypass the frontend.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser URL and interface correspond to the frontend medical app, not a CouchDB management tool (like Fauxton) or a terminal script.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Patient: James Chen, Friendly ID: P00002. Expected updates: Address = '1200 Harbor Boulevard', Phone = '555-0199', Email = 'j.chen.new@email.com'. Constraints: Original details must remain unchanged (First Name: James, Last Name: Chen, DOB: 1978-11-22, Sex: Male, Blood Type: A+).
